description: Canonical INTENDED rarity for the AllianceDAO NFT collection (terra1phr9fngjv7a8an4dhmhd0u0f98wazxfnzccqtyheq4zqrrp4fpuqw3apw9). Rarity is determined solely by the Object trait, which the collection encodes as a 1-40 grade (the metadata Rarity attribute). Grade reflects the HashLips design weights (planned_count); Phoenix Rising was the rarest by design (planned 12) and is the apex grade 40. Planet, Inhabitant, Light and Weather are generative scene layers and are NOT rarity factors. Within a grade all tokens are equal-rarity; rank within a grade is assigned by ascending token id only to produce a distinct 1-10000 ordinal.
